generators.description: Generates the GitHub bundle overview page and source-family pages using the agreed prototype source-panel layout. Root-level files are integrated into the overview narrative. Source family pages use real code, family pills and file-specific explanatory notes. The generator must not emit source/bundle-root/.

sourceBoundary: Generated documentation only. Canonical bundle source remains under .agent-operating-model/bundles/github/.

prototypeContract.overviewPage: The /bundles/github/ page follows the agreed navigation prototype: Purpose, How to read the bundle, Prompt spec, Mutation policy, Source panels, Worked flow and Coverage note.
prototypeContract.sourcePanels: Source panels follow the prototype component structure: source-head, family pill, real source code and notes panel.
prototypeContract.notesPanel: The notes panel contains file-specific How the agent uses this file and What to look for guidance. It must not render canonical source metadata or file-size details.
forbiddenOutput: language-only pills such as XML, JSON, YAML or PYTHON

notes: The static site is intentionally placed outside the canonical bundle directory.
Generated pages should not be hand-edited.
Root-level bundle files are rendered into the overview page, not into a source/bundle-root page.
Source category pages use the prototype source-panel pattern with family labels such as mode, role, reference, contract, grader, template, script and example.
